title: Site Supervisor
description:
Company Overview

CONSTRUCTIONS INDUSTRIELLES DE LA MEDITERRANEE - CNIM SINGAPORE PRIVATE LIMITED

Job Summary

You will report to the Project Engineer / Manager and lead the supervision of elevator and escalator installation projects from project takeover to handover, ensuring quality, safety, and schedule adherence on site.

Responsibilities

  • Lead and supervise subcontractors to execute installation and modernization of lifts and escalators on site, ensuring compliance with project plans and specifications
  • Collaborate with customers and subcontractors to plan and coordinate installation activities, optimizing resource allocation and timelines
  • Verify site dimensions and manage logistics for timely equipment delivery, ensuring consistency between structural drawings and actual site conditions
  • Monitor and enforce safety protocols, quality standards, and project progress throughout installation phases
  • Perform material requisition, report quality feedback, project supervision and schedule of works.
  • Ensure installation is carried out as per drawings and approved specifications.
  • Conduct installation checks with customers in accordance to approved checklists.
  • Ensure installed/modernized equipment can be readily startup for testing and commissioning.
  • Report project progress and any non-conformities to superior.
  • Need to understand and comply to local Environmental, Health and Safety (EH&S) requirement as well as site requirements.

Required competencies and certifications

  • Diploma or Higher Nitec in Vertical Transportation, Engineering, or relevant disciplines
  • Minimum 2 years of relevant work experience in elevator/escalator installation or modernization of escalator
  • Experience working on elevator/escalator projects at MRT work sites will be advantageous
  • Perform work night shift when required
  • Proficiency in Microsoft Office (Word, Excel, PowerPoint)
  • Proactive attitude, self-motivated, team player, adaptable and agile.

We regret that only shortlisted candidates will be notified

postedCompany.description: CNIM Singapore Pte. Ltd. is an international engineering and construction company specializing in complex industrial, energy, and environmental infrastructure projects. Headquartered in Singapore, CNIM Singapore serves as a regional hub supporting project execution across Asia. The company is committed to operational excellence, safety, quality, and the delivery of sustainable engineering solutions, while fostering a professional and performance-driven work environment.
